items.summary: The Royals lost to the New York Mets, KC 3, NYM 7. Lane Thomas led the night, 1-4 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 105.4 mph.
items.title: Royals at Mets Recap
